  • Overview
  • Tree
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    ConnectionSupplier
    Provides the JDBC Connection that should participate in the caller's transaction.
    DialectCapability
    Optional database features an OutboxDialect may declare.
    IdGenerator
    Produces the UUID written to the id column when the caller did not set one on the OutboxEvent.
    JdbcOutbox
    JDBC implementation of Outbox.
    JdbcOutbox.Builder
    Fluent builder for JdbcOutbox.
    JdbcOutboxBuilderCustomizer
    Callback for advanced customization of the auto-configured JdbcOutbox bean.
    MeteredOutbox
    Decorator that adds Micrometer instrumentation to every publish and publishAll call without changing the contract of the underlying Outbox.
    Outbox
    Writes domain events to the outbox table inside the caller's database transaction.
    OutboxAutoConfiguration
    Auto-configures an Outbox bean backed by JdbcOutbox.
    OutboxConfigurationException
    Signals that the outbox cannot operate because the deployment is misconfigured: the outbox table is missing, columns do not match the expected schema, the JDBC driver is not on the classpath, or the configured DataSource cannot be opened at all.
    OutboxDataException
    Signals that the event itself is malformed for the underlying store: a column value out of range, a string that exceeds the declared length, an invalid JSON document for the headers column, or a numeric overflow.
    OutboxDialect
    Dialect SPI for outbox-jdbc.
    OutboxDialectContractTest
    Abstract JUnit 5 contract test base for OutboxDialect implementations.
    OutboxDialectProvider
    Service-loaded factory for OutboxDialect.
    OutboxEvent
    One row to be written to the outbox table.
    OutboxEvent.Builder
    Fluent builder for OutboxEvent.
    OutboxException
    Thrown when the outbox store rejects a write that the caller had no way to prevent — typically an underlying SQL error, a connectivity failure, or a schema mismatch.
    OutboxHealthIndicator
    Spring Boot Actuator AbstractHealthIndicator that probes the outbox table.
    OutboxInsert
    Per-batch insert handle returned by OutboxDialect.prepareInsert(Connection, TableRef).
    OutboxIntegrityException
    Signals an integrity-constraint violation: most commonly a duplicate primary key, meaning an event with the same id has already been written to the outbox.
    OutboxOpenTelemetrySdkAutoConfiguration
    Bridges Spring's Environment into AutoConfiguredOpenTelemetrySdk so otel.* keys placed in application.yml (or any other PropertySource) are honored by the SDK.
    OutboxProperties
    Configuration for OutboxAutoConfiguration.
    OutboxProperties.Health
    Health indicator settings.
    OutboxProperties.Metrics
    Metrics decorator settings.
    OutboxProperties.Tracing
    Tracing decorator settings.
    OutboxProperties.Tracing.Sdk
    Spring-aware opentelemetry-sdk-extension-autoconfigure bridge.
    OutboxTransientException
    Signals a transient failure of the underlying store: connectivity loss, deadlock, serialization conflict, lock timeout, or any condition the database itself classifies as retryable.
    OutboxValidationException
    Signals that an OutboxEvent cannot be constructed because the caller supplied an invalid field value: a null required component, a blank string where a non-blank value is required, or a null key/value inside the headers map.
    TableRef
    Reference to the target outbox table.
    TracedOutbox
    Decorator that wraps every publish and publishAll call in an OpenTelemetry span using the messaging.* semantic conventions, and injects the active trace context into the event's headers so downstream consumers (relay / CDC / broker) can create a linked CONSUMER span from the event alone.
